name: Raekwon
bio: Raekwon (Corey Woods) is an American rapper and a founding member of the Wu-Tang Clan. He is celebrated for his storytelling and vivid lyricism, especially on his acclaimed solo album 'Only Built 4 Cuban Linx...'.
facts: His debut solo album is considered a classic in hip-hop.
Known as 'The Chef' for his ability to 'cook up' intricate rhymes.
